Off Calendar Sep-25-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:


Appearance:
Irene Kelly, pro per, for Defendant and Opposing Party

Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiff Discover Bank's Hearing on Claim of Exemption is granted, except for $50 per pay period. The levying officer is directed to release any earnings to the judgment creditor for payment on the judgment. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
